---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the oracle, tooling, or agent integration
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / motivation**
What problem does this solve? Who benefits (human, agent, integrator)?

**Proposed solution**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches.

**Additional context**
Links, references, or mockups.
